title: Fix one small thing in your home that's been broken for weeks
flavour: the squeaky hinge. the dead lightbulb. the thing you walk past. fix it.

title: Learn 5 keyboard shortcuts you didn't know
flavour: your mouse hand is tired. teach your fingers the language.

title: Sketch or doodle something — no skill required, just make marks
flavour: you don't have to be good at it. that's not the point. make something.

title: Learn to make one new thing in the kitchen
flavour: recipe difficulty: beginner. outcome: you can make this forever now.

title: Tidy and reorganize one drawer or shelf
flavour: chaos: contained. the dopamine from this is unreasonably good.

title: Learn 5 words in a language you've always wanted to learn
flavour: five words. tiny. irreversible. you now know five words you didn't know.

title: Teach yourself one new Excel/Sheets formula or shortcut
flavour: VLOOKUP will change your life. no seriously. go look it up right now.

title: Write a poem — terrible is allowed, quitting is not
flavour: output: poem. quality: irrelevant. completion: mandatory.

title: Learn how something in your daily life actually works
flavour: pick any object. wifi router. microwave. your own immune system. how does it work?

title: Plant something — seed, cutting, or pot a new plant
flavour: living thing. in your custody. keep it alive. level 1: grow something.
